jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Docplexus
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
